name: Scout's Brownies
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 ounces best-quality unsweetened chocolate (recommended brands: Callebaut or Valrhona; available at Williams-Sonoma)
3 tablespoons dark European-style unsweetened cocoa (recommended brand: Hershey's Premium European-Style)
1 1/2 cups all-purpose flour (high altitude - add 2 tablespoons)
1 cup chocolate chips (recommended brand: Mrs. Fields)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (high altitude -375 degrees Fahrenheit).
2. Melt butter with unsweetened chocolate in the top of a double boiler, stirring occasionally.
3. Set aside to cool.
4. Sift together cocoa, flour, baking powder, and salt.
5. Beat eggs until creamy, then gradually add sugar, beating constantly.
6. Add vanilla and cooled chocolate-butter mixture.
7. Stir in dry ingredients just until combined.
8. Spread batter in a buttered 9 x 13 inch pan.
9. Sprinkle chips over the surface.
10. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until the center no longer jiggles when shaken.
11. Cool, then cut into 32 pieces.
Makes 32 brownies.
